title: Dungeon Chest Loot
quickAnswer: Simple dungeons are usually worth looting early because the risk is modest and the chests can contain strong utility items like saddles, name tags, and music discs.
keyFacts: Dungeon chests are an early source of loot you cannot craft cheaply, especially saddles and name tags.
The attached spawner can also turn the room into a future XP or mob-drop farm.
Value drops later, but the structure still matters for specific utility items.
commonMistakes: Breaking the spawner immediately before deciding whether the room is worth converting into a farm.
Underlighting the room and getting overwhelmed in a tight cave fight.
